recommendations.title: The Outsider
recommendations.overview: Philippe Jordan is a policeman prone to advancing the cause of justice by any means necessary. On his agenda is a powerful drug cartel working out of Paris and Marseilles, with a drug lord who is essentially inaccessible -- but not immortal.

recommendations.title: Spycies
recommendations.overview: Vladimir and Hector, two secret agents opposed in every way, are trying to recover a top secret material stolen by unknown intruders.

recommendations.title: Inside Man: Most Wanted
recommendations.overview: An NYPD hostage negotiator teams up with a federal agent to rescue dozens of tourists held hostage during a 10-hour seige at the U.S. Federal Reserve.

recommendations.title: Nighthawks
recommendations.overview: When one of Europe's most lethal terrorists shows up in New York, an elite undercover cop is assigned to take him down by any means necessary.

recommendations.title: Dutch
recommendations.overview: To get to know his girlfriend's son, a man volunteers to pick him up from a prep school... only to learn that her son's not the nicest kid.

recommendations.title: Death Wish 4: The Crackdown
recommendations.overview: After the death of his girlfriend's daughter from a drug overdose, Paul Kersey takes on the local drug cartel.

recommendations.title: The Negotiator
recommendations.overview: The police try to arrest expert hostage negotiator Danny Roman, who insists he's being framed for his partner's murder in what he believes is an elaborate conspiracy. Thinking there's evidence in the Internal Affairs offices that might clear him, he

recommendations.title: Heli
recommendations.overview: Heli must try and protect his young family when his 12-year-old sister inadvertently involves them in the brutal drug world. He must battle against the drug cartel that have been angered as well as the corrupt police force.

recommendations.title: Running with the Devil
recommendations.overview: A leader of a drug cartel sends his two toughest henchmen to investigate why a shipment was botched.

recommendations.title: Blackout
recommendations.overview: A man wakes in a hospital with no memory, and quickly finds himself on the run in a locked down hospital with the Cartel on his tail.
